decision: Stories collection — wire reflecting node in mind map and build CRUD collection for harvested stories

steps.action: design stories collection schema and harvest spec
steps.notes: Stories collection schema designed. Brief sent to Kade with full collection pattern spec: interface, pod service, handler, views, routes, navbar, mind map node. Fuseki graph gathering:stories. RDF type gathering:Story.

steps.action: wire Stories collection — pod service handler views routes navbar mind map node
steps.notes: Stories collection shipped — pod service, handler, 3 views, routes, ontology v1.1.0, navbar, mind map. 23 new tests (2333 total). Commit dc98f75, deployed.

steps.action: review Fuseki schema and verify deploy
steps.notes: Schema review passed — ontology matches spec (jb:Story, StoryCollection, 4 new properties). Route live (200), Fuseki empty as expected. 23 tests, 2333 total. Deploy verified at dc98f75.
